title: zapoteca formosa subsp. sinaloana
intro: Zapoteca formosa subsp. sinaloana, also known as Sinaloan zapote, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Zapoteca formosa subsp. sinaloana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
